info.description: REST control plane for orka'i self-hosted PaaS
info.title: Orkai API

get.description: Returns whether the system has been initialized.
Requires admin role. Returns all event types with labels and categories for the settings UI.

namespace.description: K8s mapping (runtime config for k3s targets)

build_enabled.description:
Build configuration. When BuildEnabled is true, the site is built in an
in-cluster Kubernetes build pod (npm/pnpm) and the contents of
RootDirectory/OutputDir are synced instead of PublishPath.

custom_domain.description:
Custom domain (optional). ACM cert is always us-east-1; DNS may use a
different cloud_account than CloudFront/S3.

publish_path.description:
PublishPath is the folder in the repo whose contents are synced to the
bucket root. Default "." = repo root. Used when BuildEnabled is false
(pre-built static files committed to the repo).

runtime.description: Runtime state (AWS resource IDs), persisted incrementally.

email.description: uniqueness enforced via partial index idx_users_email_active (active rows only)

namespace.description: K8s mapping (runtime config for k3s targets)

build_enabled.description:
Build configuration. When BuildEnabled is true, the site is built in an
in-cluster Kubernetes build pod (npm/pnpm) and the contents of
RootDirectory/OutputDir are synced instead of PublishPath.

custom_domain.description:
Custom domain (optional). ACM cert is always us-east-1; DNS may use a
different cloud_account than CloudFront/S3.

publish_path.description:
PublishPath is the folder in the repo whose contents are synced to the
bucket root. Default "." = repo root. Used when BuildEnabled is false
(pre-built static files committed to the repo).

runtime.description: Runtime state (AWS resource IDs), persisted incrementally.

alias_target.description: CloudFront domain for final DNS alias

certificate_arn.description: Custom domain + ACM (certificate always in us-east-1 for CloudFront).

distribution_arn.description: needed to (re)apply the bucket policy idempotently

email.description: uniqueness enforced via partial index idx_users_email_active (active rows only)

storage_class.description: optional override; empty uses target default

BearerAuth.description: JWT access token or API key (ork_…)
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
